title: Banana Ukrainian Pancakes
description: A sweet Ukrainian-inspired breakfast pancake recipe with mashed banana and topped with a sweet salty syrup.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and eggs.
Add mashed bananas, milk, and melted butter. Stir until combined.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm with sweet salty syrup (recipe below).
To make the syrup, combine equal parts sugar and water in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in a pinch of salt.
